end return(function(o,g,L,q,U,W,l,Z,M,d,P,X,y,j,p,v,Q,x,t,C,K,z)j,C,t,Z,y,p,d,v,X,x,P,Q,K,z,M=function(o,S)local g=d(S)local L=function(L)return X(o,{L},S,g)end return L end,function(o,S)local g=d(S)local L=function(...)return X(o,{...},S,g)end return L end,function(o,S)local g=d(S)local L=function(L,q)return X(o,{L,q},S,g)end return L end,function(o,S)local g=d(S)local
